summary.intent: Implement the framework-agnostic Carousel state machine (issue #278) for the ars-ui component library, following the existing spec and codebase conventions.
summary.outcome: Fully implemented, audited, and verified the Carousel agnostic core with 82 inline tests, 22 snapshot fixtures, proptest coverage, and 97.88% line coverage. All CI gates passed; changes committed and pushed as a PR targeting main.

repo: Agnostic core has no set_interval/clear_interval — timer effects must be modeled as typed Effect enum variants emitted via PendingEffect::named/cancel_effect, following the toast::single::Effect precedent

When a machine boots into a state that requires an active effect (e.g., AutoPlaying), an initial_effects override is required so adapters can drain via take_initial_effects() on mount — without it the timer never arms
MessageFn implements PartialEq, so any Messages struct stored in Context must also derive PartialEq or the Machine trait bound fails
ComponentPart derive uses kebab-case: multi-word variants like AutoPlayTrigger map to 'auto-play-trigger'
#[must_use] on all *_attrs methods is enforced workspace-wide (splitter, collapsible precedent)
Closures passed to .apply() require an explicit &mut Context type annotation — Rust inference doesn't resolve it without the annotation
Multi-arg closure fields that trigger clippy type_complexity should be factored into named type aliases (e.g., SlideLabelFn), matching the splitter convention
cargo xci-fast is the mandatory pre-push gate (10 steps, includes coverage threshold checks at 98.4% line / 90.1% branch for ars-components)
cargo insta test --features i18n --unreferenced=reject is the snapshot orphan check; i18n feature must be enabled or highlight utility fixtures appear as false-positive orphans
Splitter component is the canonical implementation pattern to mirror for new layout components (imports, builder structure, Api Debug derive, test helper shape)

code.finding: GoToSlide and FocusSlide must clamp index to [0, slide_count-1] — spec originally left it unclamped, which would silently break every connect method for out-of-range inputs
autoplay_indicator_attrs was named inconsistently with its sibling auto_play_trigger_attrs and the AutoPlayIndicator Part variant — renamed to auto_play_indicator_attrs
Carousel has no on_props_changed, so props are init-time config only — the proptest must thread slide_count into the event strategy rather than using set_props mid-sequence
map_or(false, |x| x.cond()) is non-idiomatic in this workspace (clippy -D warnings enforced) — spec must use is_some_and to stay compilable as doc snippets

workflow: GitHub Projects board should be updated to 'In Progress' before starting implementation, not after
Post-implementation audit runs in 3 phases: spec/impl drift check, iterative 'anything missing?' rounds (terminate after 2 consecutive clean rounds), then llvm-cov gap analysis
llvm-cov text output is too noisy to grep reliably for per-file uncovered lines — reasoning from branch structure to identify gaps is more practical than fighting the tool's output format
cargo xci-fast output is buffered until completion when piped through tail; use an until-loop monitor or background task notification rather than polling a read
Spec markdown must be kept in sync with impl changes throughout the session, not deferred to end — spec validates as part of the CI gate

friction: KeyboardEventData was assumed to derive Default (like some other components) but does not — required field-literal construction, discovered only at compile time
Event capture closures in tests needed explicit block-scoping for borrow lifetimes; the error message (E0499) was not immediately obvious
llvm-cov per-file filtering via regex lookahead is unsupported, making carousel-specific uncovered line extraction awkward and requiring a reasoning-based fallback
cargo xci-fast piped output buffers until process exit, making progress monitoring during the wait require an until-loop workaround
Spec had three accumulated drift points (timer API, initial_effects, PartialEq + imports) that required multiple targeted edits before the impl could compile against it
open_items: Adapter specs for leptos and dioxus carousel (spec/leptos-components/layout/carousel.md, spec/dioxus-components/layout/carousel.md) exist but are not yet implemented
Codex review loop was mentioned as a planned follow-up step after the PR push but is not shown as completed in the transcript
Issue #278 was moved to In Progress but not yet closed — depends on PR review and merge
